judge_result.short_rationale: Fresh air is correct, but the answer omits two required immediate actions: call 911/ambulance if not breathing and call poison control or a doctor for treatment advice. It also adds unsupported and wrong-incident guidance (washing mouth/nose, do-not-induce-vomiting), which counts as dangerous unsupported content. Hospital escalation alone does not match the source.
